title: koeleria oreophila subsp. colombiana
intro: Koeleria oreophila subsp. colombiana is a subspecies of the Koeleria oreophila plant, a type of grass native to the Andean region of Colombia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koeleria oreophila subsp. colombiana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
